mapper.sql: FROM AUCTION a JOIN PRODUCT p ON p.PRD_SN = a.PRD_SN JOIN CATEGORY c ON c.CAT_SN = p.CAT_SN JOIN USERS u ON u.USR_SN = p.USR_SN LEFT JOIN CMM_CODE aucStatus ON aucStatus.CMM_CD = a.AUC_STATUS_CD LEFT JOIN CMM_CODE tradeMethod ON tradeMethod.CMM_CD = p.PRD_TRD_METHOD_CD LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pi.PRD_SN, CONCAT(f.FL_PATH, '/', f.FL_SAVE_NM) AS THUMBNAIL_PATH FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE pi JOIN FILES f ON f.FL_SN = pi.FL_SN AND f.FL_USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN ( SELECT PRD_SN, MIN(CASE WHEN PRD_IMG_RPRS_YN = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END * 100000 + PRD_IMG_SORT_NO) AS SORT_KEY FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE GROUP BY PRD_SN ) picked ON picked.PRD_SN = pi.PRD_SN AND picked.SORT_KEY = CASE WHEN pi.PRD_IMG_RPRS_YN = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END * 100000 + pi.PRD_IMG_SORT_NO ) thumb ON thumb.PRD_SN = p.PRD_SN LEFT JOIN ( SELECT AUC_SN, COUNT(*) AS BID_COUNT FROM BID GROUP BY AUC_SN ) bid ON bid.AUC_SN = a.AUC_SN LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRD_SN, COUNT(*) AS FAVORITE_COUNT FROM PRODUCT_FAVORITE WHERE PRD_FAV_USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY PRD_SN ) favorite ON favorite.PRD_SN = p.PRD_SN
mapper.select:
SELECT a.AUC_SN AS auctionId, p.PRD_SN AS productId, p.PRD_NM AS title, c.CAT_NM AS categoryName, a.AUC_CUR_AMT AS currentPrice, p.PRD_START_AMT AS startPrice, p.PRD_IBY_AMT AS instantBuyPrice, a.AUC_STATUS_CD AS auctionStatusCode, aucStatus.CMM_NM AS auctionStatusName, p.PRD_TRD_METHOD_CD AS tradeMethodCode, tradeMethod.CMM_NM AS tradeMethodName, a.AUC_START_DT AS startDateTime, a.AUC_END_DT AS endDateTime, COALESCE(bid.BID_COUNT, 0) AS bidCount, COALESCE(favorite.FAVORITE_COUNT, 0) AS favoriteCount, p.PRD_VIEW_CNT AS viewCount, u.USR_NM AS sellerName, thumb.THUMBNAIL_PATH AS thumbnailPath
ORDER BY a.AUC_CUR_AMT ASC, a.AUC_END_DT ASC
ORDER BY COALESCE(bid.BID_COUNT, 0) DESC, a.AUC_END_DT ASC
ORDER BY a.AUC_REG_DT DESC, a.AUC_SN DESC
ORDER BY a.AUC_END_DT ASC, a.AUC_SN DESC
LIMIT #{condition.size} OFFSET #{condition.offset}

SELECT a.AUC_SN AS auctionId, p.PRD_SN AS productId, p.PRD_NM AS title, p.PRD_CN AS content, c.CAT_NM AS categoryName, a.AUC_CUR_AMT AS currentPrice, p.PRD_START_AMT AS startPrice, p.PRD_IBY_AMT AS instantBuyPrice, a.AUC_BID_UNIT_AMT AS bidUnitPrice, a.AUC_STATUS_CD AS auctionStatusCode, aucStatus.CMM_NM AS auctionStatusName, p.PRD_TRD_METHOD_CD AS tradeMethodCode, tradeMethod.CMM_NM AS tradeMethodName, a.AUC_START_DT AS startDateTime, a.AUC_END_DT AS endDateTime, COALESCE(bid.BID_COUNT, 0) AS bidCount, COALESCE(favorite.FAVORITE_COUNT, 0) AS favoriteCount, p.PRD_VIEW_CNT AS viewCount, u.USR_SN AS sellerId, u.USR_NM AS sellerName FROM AUCTION a JOIN PRODUCT p ON p.PRD_SN = a.PRD_SN JOIN CATEGORY c ON c.CAT_SN = p.CAT_SN JOIN USERS u ON u.USR_SN = p.USR_SN LEFT JOIN CMM_CODE aucStatus ON aucStatus.CMM_CD = a.AUC_STATUS_CD LEFT JOIN CMM_CODE tradeMethod ON tradeMethod.CMM_CD = p.PRD_TRD_METHOD_CD LEFT JOIN ( SELECT AUC_SN, COUNT(*) AS BID_COUNT FROM BID GROUP BY AUC_SN ) bid ON bid.AUC_SN = a.AUC_SN LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRD_SN, COUNT(*) AS FAVORITE_COUNT FROM PRODUCT_FAVORITE WHERE PRD_FAV_USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY PRD_SN ) favorite ON favorite.PRD_SN = p.PRD_SN WHERE a.AUC_SN = #{auctionId}

SELECT a.AUC_SN AS aucSn, a.PRD_SN AS prdSn, a.AUC_STATUS_CD AS aucStatusCd, a.AUC_CUR_AMT AS aucCurAmt, COUNT(b.BID_SN) AS bidCount, a.AUC_START_DT AS aucStartDt, a.AUC_END_DT AS aucEndDt, a.AUC_EXT_CNT AS aucExtCnt FROM AUCTION a LEFT JOIN BID b ON b.AUC_SN = a.AUC_SN WHERE a.PRD_SN = #{prdSn} GROUP BY a.AUC_SN, a.PRD_SN, a.AUC_STATUS_CD, a.AUC_CUR_AMT, a.AUC_START_DT, a.AUC_END_DT, a.AUC_EXT_CNT

SELECT pi.PRD_IMG_SN AS imageId, f.FL_SN AS fileId, f.FL_ORG_NM AS originalName, CONCAT(f.FL_PATH, '/', f.FL_SAVE_NM) AS path, pi.PRD_IMG_RPRS_YN AS representative, pi.PRD_IMG_SORT_NO AS sortNo FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE pi JOIN FILES f ON f.FL_SN = pi.FL_SN AND f.FL_USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE pi.PRD_SN = #{productId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN pi.PRD_IMG_RPRS_YN = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, pi.PRD_IMG_SORT_NO, pi.PRD_IMG_SN

SELECT b.BID_SN AS bidId, b.BID_AMT AS bidPrice, b.BID_STATUS_CD AS bidStatusCode, bidStatus.CMM_NM AS bidStatusName, u.USR_NM AS bidderName, b.BID_REG_DT AS bidDateTime FROM BID b JOIN USERS u ON u.USR_SN = b.USR_SN LEFT JOIN CMM_CODE bidStatus ON bidStatus.CMM_CD = b.BID_STATUS_CD WHERE b.AUC_SN = #{auctionId} ORDER BY b.BID_AMT DESC, b.BID_REG_DT DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT a.AUC_SN AS auctionId, p.USR_SN AS sellerId, currentBid.USR_SN AS currentHighestBidderId, a.AUC_CUR_AMT AS currentPrice, a.AUC_BID_UNIT_AMT AS bidUnitPrice, p.PRD_IBY_AMT AS instantBuyPrice, a.AUC_STATUS_CD AS auctionStatusCode, a.AUC_END_DT AS endDateTime FROM AUCTION a JOIN PRODUCT p ON p.PRD_SN = a.PRD_SN LEFT JOIN ( SELECT AUC_SN, MAX(USR_SN) AS USR_SN FROM BID WHERE BID_STATUS_CD = 'BIDC0001' GROUP BY AUC_SN ) currentBid ON currentBid.AUC_SN = a.AUC_SN WHERE a.AUC_SN = #{auctionId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE PRODUCT p JOIN AUCTION a ON a.PRD_SN = p.PRD_SN SET p.PRD_VIEW_CNT = p.PRD_VIEW_CNT + 1 WHERE a.AUC_SN = #{auctionId} AND p.PRD_USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AUCTION ( PRD_SN, AUC_STATUS_CD, AUC_CUR_AMT, AUC_BID_UNIT_AMT, AUC_END_DT, AUC_REG_ID, AUC_UPDT_ID ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{statusCode}, #{currentAmount}, #{bidUnitAmount}, #{endDateTime}, #{actor}, #{actor} )
mapper.update: UPDATE BID SET BID_STATUS_CD = 'BIDC0002', BID_UPDT_ID = 'SYSTEM', BID_UPDT_DT = NOW() WHERE AUC_SN = #{auctionId} AND BID_STATUS_CD = 'BIDC0001'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BID ( AUC_SN, USR_SN, BID_AMT, BID_STATUS_CD, BID_REG_ID, BID_UPDT_ID ) VALUES ( #{auctionId}, #{userId}, #{bidAmount}, #{statusCode}, #{actor}, #{actor} )
mapper.update: UPDATE AUCTION SET AUC_CUR_AMT = #{bidAmount}, AUC_UPDT_ID = #{actor}, AUC_UPDT_DT = NOW() WHERE AUC_SN = #{auctionId} AND AUC_STATUS_CD = 'AUCC0002' AND AUC_CUR_AMT < #{bidAmount}
UPDATE AUCTION SET AUC_CUR_AMT = #{bidAmount}, AUC_STATUS_CD = 'AUCC0003', AUC_END_DT = NOW(), AUC_UPDT_ID = #{actor}, AUC_UPDT_DT = NOW() WHERE AUC_SN = #{auctionId}
